titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Jonathan Dodd Collection of Edward Albee, Stephen Sondheim, and Tennessee Williams
Dodd (Jonathan) Collection of Edward Albee, Stephen Sondheim, and Tennessee Williams
titlestmt.author: by Emma Gronbeck

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday September 8, 2022 at 03:25

did.unittitle: Jonathan Dodd collection of Edward Albee, Stephen Sondheim, and Tennessee Williams

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

did.abstract: The collection contains drafts and print editions of scripts, scores, and other writings by American playwrights Edward Albee and Tennessee Williams, and musical theater writer and composer Stephen Sondheim. Also included is correspondence, contracts, and other materials related to the publication of Sondheim's and Williams's works; photographs; printed materials, such as playbills, souvenir programs, periodicals, and clippings; and notes and inventories related to the collection.

bioghist.head: Jonathan Dodd (1936-2017)
bioghist.p: Jonathan Dodd (1936-2017) was an American publisher and book collector. Born in Boston in 1936, Dodd spent the majority of his life moving between Connecticut and Rhode Island. After graduating from Yale University in 1958, he joined the publishing house Dodd, Mead, & Company, founded by his great-great grandfather, Moses W. Dodd, in 1839. Dodd eventually assumed the role of president of the company prior to its closure in 1990. He died on January 3, 2017, in Westerly, Rhode Island.

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: The collection contains drafts and print editions of scripts, scores, and other writings by American playwrights Edward Albee and Tennessee Williams, and musical theater writer and composer Stephen Sondheim. Also included is correspondence, contracts, and other materials related to the publication of Sondheim's and Williams's works; photographs; printed materials, such as playbills, souvenir programs, periodicals, and clippings; and notes and inventories related to the collection.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The collection is organized into three series: I. Edward Albee, 1960-2014. II. Stephen Sondheim, 1954-2015. III. Tennessee Williams, 1928-2015.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collections are processed to a variety of levels, depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived research value, the availability of staff, competing priorities, and whether or not further accruals are expected. The library attempts to provide a basic level of preservation and access for all collections, and does more extensive processing of higher priority collections as time and resources permit. Information included in the Description of Papers note and Collection Contents section is drawn from information supplied with the collection and from an initial survey of the contents. Folder titles appearing in the contents list below are often based on those provided by the creator or previous custodian. Titles have not been verified against the contents of the folders in all cases. Otherwise, folder titles are supplied by staff during initial processing. This finding aid may be updated periodically to account for new acquisitions to the collection and/or revisions in arrangement and description.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The Jonathan Dodd Collection of Edward Albee, Stephen Sondheim, and Tennessee Williams is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Purchased from Glenn Horowitz Bookseller, Inc. on the Edwin J. Beinecke Book Fund, 2018, and gift of Mrs. Lyell Dodd, 2018.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Jonathan Dodd Collection of Edward Albee, Stephen Sondheim, and Tennessee Williams. Yale Collection of American Literature, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library.

separatedmaterial.head: Separated Materials
separatedmaterial.p: Printed material received with the collection was removed for separate cataloging and can be accessed by searching the library's online catalog.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains script drafts, photographs, and notes on the works of Edward Albee, as well as printed material including periodicals in which Albee's writings were published, clippings related to performances of his work, and playbills and souvenir programs from various performances.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized into two subseries: Writings and Theater Productions, and Printed Materials.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This subseries contains script drafts of Edward Albee's theatrical works, concept art and photographs for several theatrical productions of his work, and notes and lists compiled by Jonathan Dodd on his collection of Albee materials.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged alphabetically by title, with photographs and Jonathan Dodd's notes on the collection filed at the end of the sequence.

Jonathan Dodd's notes on Albee materials

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This subseries contains playbills, souvenir programs, clippings, and periodicals containing articles related to Edward Albee's writings and theatrical productions of his works.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains script drafts, sheet music, correspondence, contracts, photographs, and printed material related to Stephen Sondheim's works and their adaptations.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized into two subseries: Writings and Theater Productions, and Printed Materials.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This subseries contains correspondence; publishing contracts; script drafts, proofs, and galleys; sheet music drafts; concept art and photographs from stage productions of Stephen Sondheim's works; and notes and lists compiled by Jonathan Dodd on his collection of Sondheim materials.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged alphabetically by title, with correspondence and Jonathan Dodd's notes on the collection filed at the end of the sequence.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This subseries contains playbills, souvenir programs, clippings, and periodicals containing articles related to the musicals of Stephen Sondheim and theatrical productions of his works.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains drafts of writings, publishing records, photographs, correspondence, and printed material related to the works of Tennessee Williams and theatrical productions of his plays.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized into two subseries: Writings, and Printed Materials.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This subseries contains drafts, galleys, and proofs of Tennessee Williams's scripts and short stories; materials related to the publication of Williams's Collected Stories ; production photographs; correspondence; and notes and lists compiled by Jonathan Dodd on his collection of Williams materials.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged alphabetically by work, with photographs, correspondence, and Jonathan Dodd's notes on the collection filed at the end of the sequence.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This subseries contains playbills, souvenir programs, and clippings related to theatrical productions of Tennessee Williams's works, as well as periodicals in which Williams's works were published.
